retrieved_result: How long does a broken finger take to heal?? Health General Health Care Injuries How long does a broken finger take to heal?? Saw the doc, had an xray, the bottom bone of my pinky is broken. He gave me a splint, said use for 5 weeks. I take it off for showering, and it's STILL swelled up. Only hurts if I try bend it. Was using NSAIDS the first
